OK, Yep. OK, do you feel weak? I don't know, maybe. Maybe a little weak, but umm, just way more tired. OK, any confusion or memory loss? Umm, no, I have been able to do some of my school work. OK, good. And you mentioned no rashes, right? No rash. OK, any weight loss over the past couple of months? : Nothing like that. No weight change, it's been the same.
